name: code-review-benchmark
description: Compare two configs on code review and generation tasks

evals.prompt: Write a Python function fizzbuzz(n) that returns a list of strings for 1..n with the standard FizzBuzz rules.
assertions: Output contains a function named fizzbuzz
The function handles multiples of 15 correctly (prints FizzBuzz)
The function returns a list of strings
evals.expected_output: A correct fizzbuzz implementation in Python

assertions: Identifies that (lo + hi) / 2 should use integer division //
Explains why float division causes an indexing error
evals.expected_output: Should identify the integer division bug

evals.prompt: Explain in 3 sentences how Python's asyncio event loop works.
assertions: Mentions cooperative multitasking or single-threaded concurrency
Mentions await or coroutines as the yield mechanism
evals.expected_output: Clear, concise explanation of asyncio fundamentals
